name: EncephalitisDueToDiphtheriaTetanusOrPertussisVaccine
title: Encephalitis Due to Diphtheria, Tetanus or Pertussis Vaccine
purpose: (Clinical Focus: The purpose of this value set is to represent concepts for a diagnosis of an encephalitis due to DTaP, diphtheria, tetanus, or pertussis vaccine.),(Data Element Scope: This value set may use a model element related to Diagnosis.),(Inclusion Criteria: Includes concepts that represent a diagnosis of encephalitis to diphtheria, tetanus or pertussis vaccine.),(Exclusion Criteria: No exclusions.)

contains.display: Encephalitis caused by component of vaccine product containing Clostridium tetani antigen (disorder)
Encephalitis caused by component of vaccine product containing Corynebacterium diphtheriae antigen (disorder)
Encephalitis caused by component of vaccine product containing Bordetella pertussis antigen (disorder)
